// why this file: Build config used ONLY by the app-level Stryker run (app/stryker.config.json
buildCommand, executed from the sandbox copy of app/). Self-contained (no
`extends`) because the sandbox breaks the ../../../tsconfig.base.json chain.
noCheck so type-invalid mutants still emit and must be killed by tests, not
the compiler. This package is type:module, so the emitted tests run as ESM.
